history.text: Establishment of the Sudanese Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
Merger with Senegal to create the Mali Federation tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Mali became independent from France, marking a key step in modern statehood.
Dissolution of the Mali Federation tied the territory into a wider political structure.
Declaration of the Republic of Mali introduced a new form of state rule.
